seo.title: Our Services | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: CQC-compliant Healthcare Assistants, Support Workers, and Cleaners for care homes, nursing homes, and supported living across London.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Services
fields.sub: A reliable care agency is essential for ensuring that care homes, nursing homes, and supported living services receive skilled, compassionate, and professional staff.

items.title: Healthcare Assistants (HCAs)
items.body: Personal care support – assisting with washing, dressing, mobility, and meals

items.title: Support Workers
items.body: Mental health and learning disability support to promote independence

fields.heading: Why Choose Vigil Care Staffing as Your Staffing Agency
fields.body: Fully CQC-compliant staffing provider Flexible staffing options – temporary, long-term, or emergency cover Rigorous recruitment – enhanced DBS checks, references, and mandatory training Fast response – we provide cover 24/7, including weekends and holidays Sector expertise – we understand the specific needs of health and social care providers

fields.heading: Who We Work With
fields.body: a wide range of clients across the health and social care sector, including: Nursing Homes Residential Care Homes Supported Living Facilities Mental Health Services Local Authorities

items.q: What types of care professionals do you supply?
items.a: Our care agency specialises in Healthcare Assistants, Support Workers, and Cleaners for care homes, supported living, and nursing facilities.
Yes. Every professional from our care agency is fully vetted, DBS-checked, and trained to meet CQC standards.
Absolutely. We offer 24/7 emergency staffing as part of our responsive care agency service.
You can call, email, or complete our online request form. A member of our care agency team will respond quickly with suitable options.

fields.heading: Get In Touch Today
fields.sub: Our care agency carefully matches each staff member to your setting, ensuring the right fit for your team and service users.
